prompt: The following VCF record has a sample with a missing genotype (./.). Using the INFO fields, report (a) AC, (b) AN, (c) AF of the ALT allele, and (d) which sample has the missing genotype.
context:
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	S1	S2	S3	S4	S5
chr02	789012	.	A	G	.	PASS	AC=3;AN=8;AF=0.375	GT:GQ:DP	0/1:38:22	./.:0:0	0/0:55:30	1/1:60:41	0/1:42:18
correct_answer: (a) AC=3; (b) AN=8; (c) AF=0.375; (d) S2 has the missing genotype (./.).
rubric: Must report AC=3, AN=8, AF=0.375, and identify S2 as the missing sample. All four must be correct for full credit.
notes: Tests understanding of how missing genotypes affect AC/AN computation, a common source of confusion.
